title: 水袖情
synopsis: 民国三年（1914年）9月5日，显园。一座荒废多年的园林，因戏班排练而重新热闹起来。戏楼二层发现一具吊死的尸体，死者是戏班成员常晚亭。六名嫌疑人各有动机，而真相隐藏在水袖翩跹的舞台之下——真凶，就在戏中人之中。
styleGuide: 1914 Republican era Chinese opera house, traditional garden with theater stage, oil painting style, warm sepia tones, silk costumes, dramatic stage lighting

cover.prompt: Vertical poster for a 1914 Chinese opera murder mystery. A traditional Chinese garden with an elegant theater stage, silk curtains, warm sepia tones, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, six silhouettes in opera costumes
